text: Hello friends, Welcome to Gate Smashers In this video I am going to explain Power of Sigma in TOC And this is an important point for your competitive exams Even for your college or university level exams this is very important So guys quickly like the video and subscribe to the channel if you haven't done it yet And please press the bell button so that you get all the latest notifications So let's start Power of Sigma in TOC So if we talk about Sigma, as we discussed in language What is Sigma actually? It represents alphabet So let's suppose we have two alphabets A and B Now let's talk about the power of Sigma Means what can be the power of Sigma? So what can be the minimum power of Sigma? 0 What is the meaning of 0? You can write it as set of all strings with length 0 Means what we have given is alphabet A and B Now what you have to make by combining A and B? You have to make a string, like we do, let's suppose we take an example of English In English also, obviously like English I will give you two words A and B I will give two alphabets A and B What you have to make by combining A and B? You have to make a word Word means in a way you have to make a collection of sequence of alphabet So what do we call sequence of alphabet? We call it a string So what you have to do here? You have to make a set of all strings But what should be the length of the string? 0 What is the meaning of length of string 0? Neither you have to take A nor B So what do we call this? You will write this in a way What is this? Epsilon, it is a null string We denote epsilon with this also sometimes Or we denote it with symbol like this also So this is an important point that is called a null string Means epsilon, it contains epsilon That is called a sigma power 0 Then we talk about sigma power 1 What you can write this? Set of all strings with length 1 Means now what you have to make? You have to make that word or that string Which should have only one length So obviously what you will write?
